name: autoscaling-diagnoser
description: Diagnose Huawei Cloud CCE autoscaling failures across HPA, CCE elastic engine or Cluster Autoscaler, metrics, resource requests, Pending Pods, scheduling constraints, nodepool max nodes, subnet IP, quota, and IAM permission signals.

tools.name: huawei_autoscaling_diagnose
tools.description: Run huawei_autoscaling_diagnose through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
